KmaApiHubStructuredOutput.description: Normalized output from one KMA APIHub structured operation.
KmaApiHubStructuredOutput.title: KmaApiHubStructuredOutput

comp_type.description: KMA APIHub request parameter compType. Official parameter name: compType. Operation: WthrRadarInfoService/getCompCappiQcdAll.
comp_type.title: Comp Type

data_type.description: Response format requested from KMA APIHub. XML is the official sample/default; JSON may be used only when the operation supports it. Official parameter name: dataType. Operation: WthrRadarInfoService/getCompCappiQcdAll.
data_type.title: Data Type

data_type_cd.description: KMA APIHub request parameter dataTypeCd. Official parameter name: dataTypeCd. Operation: WthrRadarInfoService/getCompCappiQcdAll.
data_type_cd.title: Data Type Cd

date_time.description: KMA satellite/radar observation datetime, YYYYMMDDHHMM. Use a recent KST observation; APIHub returns an error outside the current 2 days window for these satellite products. Official parameter name: dateTime. Operation: WthrRadarInfoService/getCompCappiQcdAll.
date_time.title: Date Time

num_of_rows.description: Number of rows to return. Use the default unless more rows are needed. Official parameter name: numOfRows. Operation: WthrRadarInfoService/getCompCappiQcdAll.
num_of_rows.title: Num Of Rows

page_no.description: Page number, 1-based. Use the default unless the citizen asks for another page. Official parameter name: pageNo. Operation: WthrRadarInfoService/getCompCappiQcdAll.
page_no.title: Page No
